notes: Scenario suite covers normal workflow configuration guidance, integration and governance handling, operational troubleshooting, edge constraints, out-of-scope rejection, and low-confidence escalation.
Acceptance thresholds exceed the issue minimum with 12 scenarios and a 1.00 pass rate against a 0.92 threshold.
Human verification is recorded in readiness/evidence.json and aligned to the validated delivery contract for issue #140.
Local repository validation was run with npm run lint, npm run verify:structure, and npm test.
